name: Dribbble
tagline: Read an authenticated Dribbble profile and shots
description: Retrieve the authenticated Dribbble member and their published shots.

auth.hint: Register a Dribbble OAuth application, authorize the public scope, and store the resulting access token.

tools.name: get_authenticated_user
tools.description: Return the member represented by the OAuth token.

tools.name: list_user_shots
tools.description: List shots owned by the authenticated member.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Results per page, up to 100 where supported.
